learning_objective: Apply visualization techniques and statistics to evaluate model performance.
course_content: The course covers structured data modelling, preprocessing, feature extraction, statistics, cross-validation, classification, regression, clustering, model evaluation and visualization.

learning_objective: Identify the underlying algorithmic concept in a given problem.
course_content: The course introduces algorithms, data structures, asymptotic analysis, graphs, combinatorial structures and modelling.

learning_objective: Explain the role of the operating system and how computer programs are executed.
course_content: The course covers processes, threads, scheduling, system calls, synchronization, communication, device drivers, virtual memory, file systems and security aspects.

learning_objective: Calculate amounts of phases present in binary alloys in equilibrium.
course_content: The course covers materials classes, metals, polymers, ceramics, crystal structures, lattice defects, phase diagrams, phase equilibria, mechanical properties, thermal properties and material modelling.

learning_objective: Understand energy-economic terms like levelized cost of energy.
course_content: The course covers sustainable energy systems, renewable energy technologies, thermodynamics, electrochemistry, solar power, wind power, biomass, nuclear energy, energy conversion and energy storage.

learning_objective: Understand tasks normally solved by database designers and administrators.
course_content: The course covers relational databases, SQL, relational algebra, conceptual database design, ER modelling, logical database design, normalization, physical database design and database administration.

learning_objective: Apply natural language processing to represent statistical structures in text and analyze the content.
course_content: The course is based on online social networks, web APIs, social graphs, quantitative text analysis, natural language processing, sentiment detection and recommendation methods.

learning_objective: Design a multi-dimensional data model capable of answering analytical questions.
course_content: The course covers model-based techniques for integrating socio-technical systems, heterogeneous data sources, software components, requirements engineering, enterprise architectures and process models.

learning_objective: Apply visualization techniques and statistics to evaluate model performance.
course_content: The course covers sustainable energy systems, renewable energy technologies, thermodynamics, electrochemistry, solar power, wind power and energy storage.

course_content: The course covers online social networks, web APIs, text analysis, natural language processing, sentiment detection and media recommendation.
